title: JustSmooth
description: An optimized modpack designed to boost performance and enhance gameplay.
body:
# JustSmooth

Enhance your Minecraft experience with these key improvements:

- **Performance Optimizations**: Experience smoother gameplay and reduced lag.
- **Enhanced Visuals**: Includes shaders to elevate your world with stunning lighting and effects.
- **Bug Fixes**: Numerous bug fixes for a more stable and polished gameplay experience.

### Minimalistic Mod Selection

To ensure optimal performance and faster load times, we've limited the mod count to a maximum of 50 (not including essential dependencies). This modpack is designed to run smoothly on both high-end and older, lower-spec hardware, ensuring a balanced and enjoyable experience for everyone.
